cómo optimizar mi web para ChatGPT

summary_text: W26 full-coverage run (120/120). esgeo.ai SoC chrome_mcp(Perplexity, real): 0.0% — DOWN from 10.0% (W25), a -10pp critical drop. CAUSE: anonymous Perplexity this session resolved bare 'GEO' queries to geography/geoespacial/geolocalización and returned ungrounded instant-answers (no web citations) for ~16/30 queries, flipping ALL THREE W25 wins ('curso GEO en español'->geografía, 'jerarquía semántica web GEO'->geoespacial, 'citabilidad por modelos de lenguaje'->academic). Where Perplexity DID ground on GEO-marketing topics, esgeo.ai was still absent while competitors (cyberclick, iebschool, neilpatel, seo.com) appeared — consistent with persistent top-funnel invisibility. web_search_proxy SoC (ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini grounding approx): 3.33% — FLAT vs W25. esgeo.ai ranks ONLY for 'curso GEO en español' and SLIPPED from pos1 to pos2 (Elevam.es now #1; bikain, formadoresit, theintelligence, isdi also competing). esgeo is INVISIBLE on every P10 informational query (qué es GEO, qué es generative engine optimization, cómo hacer que ChatGPT cite mi web) and on commercial agency/consultancy queries (Talentum Digital positions itself as the #1 GEO consultancy in Spain). Live sessions this week: Claude.ai (Opus4.8, grounds+cites) and Gemini (Flash) are LOGGED IN — 2 real Claude spot-checks confirmed esgeo absent among 26+ sources on 'qué es GEO'. Both were proxied this run (Gemini Flash ungrounded + DOM unextractable; Claude Opus-Maximo too slow for 30 probes). Recommend wiring real Claude probes (faster mode) + Gemini source-panel extraction next week.
actions_recommended: Keyword Gap Hunter (CRITICAL): cornerstone articles for the 3 P10 informational queries where esgeo is invisible AND fragmented competitors win — 'qué es GEO' (WITH disambiguation: AI-GEO vs geografía vs Grupo Especial Operaciones, since Perplexity keeps mis-resolving the term), 'qué es generative engine optimization', 'cómo hacer que ChatGPT cite mi web'.

Commercial DEFENSE (HIGH): esgeo lost pos1->pos2 on its flagship 'curso GEO en español' (Elevam.es overtook). Strengthen Course/Offer schema, add comparison/proof content, build authority signals to retake #1.

Disambiguation fix: publish strong on-page signals (title/H1/llms.txt/schema) tying 'GEO' to Generative Engine Optimization so AI engines stop resolving brand queries to geography — this is suppressing esgeo across the board.

Authority play: 'consultoría/agencia GEO España' dominated by Talentum Digital + a Top-10 agencies ranking (escuelaeuropeadeempresa.eu) that excludes esgeo — pursue inclusion + a dedicated services/agency page.
Update competitors.json with emerging set (elevam.es, talentumdigital.com, ventia.group, geoagencia.com, dobuss.es, solumize.com, escuelaeuropeadeempresa.eu, bikain.studio).
Methodology: re-probe Perplexity with explicit 'generative engine optimization' qualifier next run to separate real visibility loss from term-disambiguation noise; enable real Claude+Gemini probes.
